title: Mermaid
review_summary: The reviewer praises "Mermaid" for its inspiring message and impressive cast featuring Ellen Burstyn and Jodelle Ferland; both actresses received Emmy nominations while Peter Masterson was nominated as best director, making the film a notable success with true-to-life production values.

title: Left Behind: The Movie
review_summary: The reviewer finds 'Left Behind' disappointing due to its poor screenplay but acknowledges strong acting; criticizes it for trying too hard with Christian themes within a G-rated film. They compare negatively against other quality religious films and criticize both books as poorly written based on bad theology, despite acknowledging personal enjoyment from them as fiction.

title: Cheeni Kum
review_summary: Amitabh Bachchan's romantic story unfolds amidst compelling camaraderie but lacks depth beyond humor in R. Balki’s first-time directorial venture; despite captivating London locales, it disappointingly drags with an uninspired second half after a promising start.
